title: How researchers are using GitHub Innovation Graph data to reveal the “digital complexity” of nations
content: Researchers used GitHub’s Innovation Graph data to compute a software‑based Economic Complexity Index (ECI), showing that digital development patterns predict GDP per capita, inequality, and emissions beyond traditional trade, patents, and research metrics. By clustering programming languages into 59 technology bundles and applying revealed comparative advantage, they found that countries specialize in related software stacks and that software ECI explains macro‑economic variation even after controlling for conventional measures. The study highlights software as a hidden driver of national economic complexity.
eventKey: how-researchers-are-using-github-innovation
normalizedTitle: how researchers are using github innovation graph data to reveal the “digital complexity” of nations

title: 以下是美国4月就业报告的主要要点
content: Key points from the U.S. April employment report: job growth slowed compared to March, with fewer new hires and higher wages. The unemployment rate rose slightly, reflecting a more cautious labor market. Employment gains were stronger in the private sector than the public sector, while construction and manufacturing lagged. The data suggest a gradual shift toward a “soft landing” for the economy, with policymakers likely to keep monetary policy tight.

It targets developers and startups needing AI, e‑commerce, video, web scraping, gaming or other workloads, promising high‑performance CPUs, large memory, fast bandwidth, global nodes, native IPs, one‑click deployment, and 24/7 support. The company claims this price will allow more entrepreneurs to access affordable cloud infrastructure.

title: CloakHQ/CloakBrowser
content: CloakHQ/CloakBrowser is a stealthy Chromium-based browser engineered to bypass all bot detection systems. It serves as a Playwright replacement, offering source‑level anti‑fingerprinting patches, and achieves 30 out of 30 detection tests. It is written in Python and has been popular among developers with over 2,400 stars and 200 forks.

title: Claude Code 效率翻 N 倍的技巧：用 Git WorkTree 并行开发
content: Using Git WorkTree, Claude Code developers can create separate working directories for each feature or bug fix. This allows multiple windows to run concurrently, enabling parallel development instead of fixed one‑by‑one tasks. After implementing this workflow, productivity increased noticeably, with developers able to address several issues simultaneously. The process is simple: add ‑‑worktree to the Claude command to spawn a new work directory. This method is recommended for users wanting to boost efficiency while using Claude Code.
eventKey: claude-code-效率翻-倍的技巧-git-worktree
normalizedTitle: claude code 效率翻 n 倍的技巧 用 git worktree 并行开发

title: AeonRiddles - 我开发的 LLM 驱动的解谜游戏
content: AeonRiddles is an LLM‑driven puzzle game by Silica Cat, building on earlier projects. It dynamically generates “Turtle Soup” riddles and a logic‑sniping challenge where players spot hidden logical flaws. Planned expansions include a Russian roulette‑style bluff game and a smuggling game similar to Paper, Please. The game uses AI to create and evaluate puzzles, offering constantly new content. It is available at the provided itch.io link.

title: 高强度使用了半年 claude code 后，我终于无法忍受了，并且我发现了绝佳替代
content: I stopped using Claude Code after a month of heavy use because it was expensive and inefficient. I switched to GenericAgent (GA), which offers lower token costs, better long‑term performance, and powerful native browser controls for web tasks. GA also has a self‑evolving agent architecture that learns from failures, improving speed and usability over time. Its task‑centric memory system performs better than many plug‑in approaches. Though the interface is basic, GA delivers superior functionality and cost‑effectiveness.

title: 安卓第三方推送，极光免费版有 2 个天坑…
content: Android developers often use third‑party push SDKs to simplify integration. Free versions of popular Chinese services, such as JPush, contain two major limitations. First, free users cannot send push messages through vendor channels; only JPush’s own channel is used. If an app is killed, JPush assumes the device is online, but heartbeats time out, leading to message loss. Second, when sending to vendor channels, only up to 30 % of users receive the push. Paid plans cost about ¥20,000 per year and are not aimed at individual developers. These drawbacks, rarely mentioned in earlier research, should be considered before choosing a push solution.
eventKey: 安卓第三方推送-极光免费版有-个天坑…

title: AI 写代码越来越强，但它不知道我们上周修了什么 bug，把 Bug 重新引入生产环境了
content:
三个月前，我们花了两周时间修了一个 bug 。 用户账单偶尔会出现 ¥0.01 的误差。复现不稳定，线上偶发，客服一直在手动补差价。翻遍了日志，最后定位到一个经典问题：浮点数精度。

0.1 + 0.2 在 IEEE 754 里不等于 0.3，这个大家都听说过，但真的踩到还是很痛。…

title: 中国五一假期旅游收入增加，但人均消费下降
content: China’s domestic tourism spending increased 2.9% during the May Day holiday, with visit numbers up 3.6%; however, the average spending per traveler decreased.

title: 2026 05 08 HackerNews
content: The Hacker News post lists top stories from May 8 2026, covering topics such as the U.S. Library of Congress endorsing SQLite for long‑term storage, the use of lightweight PeakSlab for read‑only data, Burning Man’s MOOP cleanup map, critiques of tech teams losing skill depth due to AI and capital pressure, accusations of Trump-era insider trading in oil futures, Chrome’s removal of a privacy claim, Google’s new reCAPTCHA‑based fraud defense, Inkscape 1.4.4’s bug fixes, a Nigerian program cutting child marriage, a company shifting from Clerk to Better Auth for authentication, advice on building reliable AI agents, and debates on AI’s impact on engineering practices and online communities.

title: 腾讯混元：Hy3 preview 上线两周 Token 调用增长 10 倍
content: Tencent’s MixFormer micro‑model, Hy3 preview, has seen rapid growth since launch. Its token usage has risen to ten times that of the previous Hy2 model, with significant increases in code and agent‑related scenarios. In Tencent’s applications, token consumption has surged over 16.5 times.

title: TikTok 获批泰国 250 亿美元数据中心扩建计划
content: TikTok System (Thailand) Co., Ltd. received approval from Thailand’s investment promotion commission to invest about 250 billion USD (842 billion THB) in a major data‑center expansion. The project will place servers and expand storage and processing systems in Bangkok and other locations. TikTok also pledged to develop digital literacy and e‑commerce courses to support Thai entrepreneurs and strengthen the country’s digital talent pool.

title: Meta 支持的 Scale AI 获五角大楼 5 亿美元 AI 合同
content: Scale AI won a $500 million contract from the U.S. Department of Defense to develop a “proxy AI” system for the Air Force’s Survivable On‑Board Combat Center, five times larger than its previous $100 million deal in September 2025. The company’s public‑sector head said the award shows the DoD’s willingness to adopt AI. In March, Scale AI partnered with BAE Systems to embed AI into combat platforms, and it has secured other defense contracts.
